extensionDescription.message: Shows family contact names and short notes in large text. Memo display only, with no calling features.

appLead.message: Shows names and short notes for family members you contact often in large, easy-to-read text. Calling and messaging are not available.

loadingBody.message: Checking the display list saved on this device.

onboardingGuide.message: Save one name and a short note to show them in large text on this board.

onboardingTip.message: Tip: a name alone is enough to make the first card; the short note can be added later.

emptyBody.message: Names saved on this device appear here as easy-to-read cards.

emptyNextStep.message: Use the input fields below to add a family name and short note.

editContactHint.message: Update the name and note shown on the board.

addContactHint.message: Add one name and a short note for the board display.

trialEnded.message: Trial ended. Basic display and editing still work.

premiumPrice.message: Premium is planned as a one-time purchase of $1.

premiumPlaceholder.message: The payment link is not ready yet.

loadErrorBody.message: Please close and reopen the popup.
